commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cf4a6fe66004637ae81ed1e43182fd9307dcf086)
commands.review_summary:
The PR forwards a trimmed session-memory hook `model` value into LLM slug generation and resolves it before calling the embedded slug agent.

PR surface: Source +28. Total +28 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: enable `session-memory` with `llmSlug: true` and a `model` value, then current main reads the hook config but calls the slug generator without that model and resolves the agent default instead.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR changes provider/model routing semantics, has a concrete code-review blocker, and still needs contributor real hook-run proof that automation cannot supply for the author.

target.title: fix: respect hook config model override in session-memory slug generation (#89551)
target.author: jincheng-xydt
